unit.scope: Full client vitest suite. New touch-scroll.test.ts adds 15 tests (pure accumulator + jsdom integration with synthetic TouchEvents — direction, multi-touch ignore, identifier tracking, preventDefault, dispose cleanup, custom pixels-per-line seam).

e2e.scope: Playwright touchscreen emulation synthesizes the same TouchEvent dispatches the jsdom integration tests already cover. Real verification is hands-on on the user's touchscreen device — deferred to post-merge smoke.

smoke.scope: Touchscreen smoke is the actual gate. Production server restart + client rebuild needed: `cd client && npm run build` then run scripts/start-server-production.ps1.

surface_verification.justification: Safety-enforced at small+UI, but the realistic verification surface is hands-on-touchscreen (Playwright's page.touchscreen synthesizes the same TouchEvents already covered by 15 jsdom integration tests with full event-listener dispatch — no incremental coverage). Build succeeds, typecheck clean, lint clean on touch-scroll.ts + EmbeddedTerminal.tsx. Risk acknowledged: any pure-DOM regression would also fail the jsdom integration test; only physical-finger interaction is unverified.

degraded: External LLM code review skipped — no API keys in env; self-review + 15-test jsdom integration coverage stood in. No risk flags tripped (touch-scroll touches only client/src/components/terminal/, not auth/billing/migrations/build/io-boundary).
